parsed_output.justification: Mitchell claimed to be the Seer and saw Tyler as a Copycat. Tyler claimed to be the Robber and robbed Mitchell, and James claimed to be the Troublemaker and swapped Tyler and Mitchell. Following the night action order (Seer, then Robber, then Troublemaker), if these claims are true, Mitchell (Seer) saw Tyler (Copycat/Werewolf), Tyler took the Seer card, and James swapped them back, meaning Tyler ended the night as the Werewolf and Mitchell as the Seer. Paul's claim to be the Minion and his attempt to frame Mitchell by misinterpreting the swap's result suggests he is working with Tyler to divert suspicion.
